overall.description: A cinematic ride on the NCART elevated monorail through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The journey traverses narrow neon-lit commercial streets, open bridges with city skyline views, dark tunnels, and station stops, showcasing the game's futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic with dense neon signage and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track through narrow neon-lit commercial arcade

events.description: NCART announcement text appears: Make room for fellow travelers

agents.ego_description: riding the NCART elevated train through a narrow commercial street canyon lined with bright neon billboards and advertisements

entered.detail: large orange neon sign with 'CALIENTE' text spanning across the street
green neon sign reading 'PieZ' on the right building facade
tall building covered with multiple layered digital billboards and neon advertisements
dark building facades with various commercial signage and windows
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated monorail track

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cyberpunk street canyon with dense neon signage. The CALIENTE sign glows orange overhead while the train moves forward along elevated tracks. Buildings on both sides are covered with digital billboards, creating a sheltered, neon-lit corridor with no visible pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train bridge crossing water gap with panoramic city skyline

events.description: exits narrow enclosed street into open area with expansive city skyline views
NCART announcement: Next stop Serengeti and Republic

agents.ego_description: continuing across an elevated bridge span with open views of the city skyline and water below

entered.detail: tall building with prominent green 'ORBITAL AIR' neon signage
building with orange 'Chateau Lobos' sign on the roof
dark water visible below the bridge reflecting city lights
cluster of illuminated megabuildings and towers in the background

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the narrow street onto an open bridge crossing water. The ORBITAL AIR building dominates the left side while the Chateau Lobos building sits ahead. The scene opens up to reveal distant skyscrapers across the water, transitioning from enclosed neon canyon to expansive cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station platform inside covered tunnel structure

events.description: train enters dark tunnel, lighting shifts dramatically from neon to artificial tunnel lighting
train decelerates and arrives at the NCART station platform

agents.ego_description: arriving at the station platform and slowing to a stop where passengers are waiting to board

notable_agents.action: passengers standing on the platform waiting for the train to arrive

entered.detail: covered station platform with glass walls and waiting area
dark concrete walls of the tunnel enclosure
illuminated station signs and information displays
fluorescent tube lighting along the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The train enters a dark tunnel, transitioning from the open bridge to an enclosed artificial environment. It decelerates as it approaches the NCART station platform where passengers are visible waiting on the right. The lighting shifts from colorful neon to functional white artificial light.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated track through open commercial district with corporate megabuildings

events.description: train exits tunnel back into open city environment with expansive views
NCART announcement: Next stop Memorial Park

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the open city district passing massive corporate buildings with bright neon facades

entered.detail: massive building facade covered in red neon grid pattern with 'softsys' text
tall distinctive tower with red and white lighting in the distance
lower buildings and urban infrastructure below the elevated track

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the train enters a wide-open commercial district dominated by the massive SOFTSYS building with its red neon grid on the right. The camera moves past urban plazas and toward the Memorial Park area, with the city skyline visible in the background under the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground tunnel with yellow accent lighting

events.description: train enters final tunnel section with distinctive warm yellow vertical lighting strips

agents.ego_description: traveling through the final tunnel section characterized by warm yellow ambient lighting and concrete walls

entered.detail: tunnel interior illuminated by vertical yellow light strips along the walls
smooth concrete walls with embedded yellow lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The train enters its final tunnel segment, transitioning from the open city back to an enclosed space. The environment is characterized by distinctive yellow vertical lighting strips along the concrete walls, creating a warm, artificial glow as the train continues forward through the underground passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic neon corridor into an expansive cityscape before plunging into a functional transit hub. It begins by gliding through a narrow street canyon where dense digital billboards and a glowing orange CALIENTE sign create a sheltered, neon-lit environment. As the train moves forward, the scene opens up onto a wide bridge crossing water, shifting from the enclosed corridor to a vast vista dominated by the ORBITAL AIR and Chateau Lobos buildings against a backdrop of distant skyscrapers. The camera then follows the tracks as they dive into a dark tunnel, replacing the open skyline with an enclosed artificial environment. Finally, the lighting shifts from colorful neon to sterile white as the train decelerates toward an NCART station platform where passengers wait.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit urban expanse into the confined glow of an underground tunnel. It begins as the train exits a tunnel into a sprawling commercial district, gliding past urban plazas and the massive SOFTSYS building with its prominent red neon grid. As the camera moves toward the Memorial Park area, the vast city skyline remains visible against the dark night sky. The scene then shifts as the train enters its final tunnel segment, transitioning from the open air back into an enclosed concrete space. This movement concludes with the environment narrowing into a passage defined by vertical yellow lighting strips that cast a warm, artificial glow along the walls.
